case_title: SEAN LENZ VS. MERRIMAN CAPITAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2017 - JUDGMENT.

REMARK:NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT CAME BACK RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD
